meaning: vt.施肥,使丰饶,使受精,使肥沃,使多产
examples: It only takes one sperm to fertilize an egg.
Since only one female usually lays eggs in a given larva, it would pay her to produce one male only, because this one male could fertilize all his sisters on emergence.
If they are females, a male may fertilize their eggs.
Most couples agree to fertilize far more eggs than can be implanted safely in one procedure.
We just wanted to fertilize two for implantation, and see how the process went.
